composite_description: BEAR cycle with normal conditions -- nothing to do
brief:
Crypto markets remain in macro downtrend with BTC below its 200-day moving average, confirming BEAR cycle phase. Fear and Greed sits at 11, signaling extreme risk aversion. Both BTC and alts trade within normal volatility ranges—no acceleration lower, no capitulation signal. This is grinding bear positioning without structural breakdown: the market is consolidating losses without panic or hedging desperation.

ETH and SOL show mild underperformance versus BTC (z-scores -0.87 and -1.27 respectively), consistent with risk-off flows into dominance. With funding data unavailable and no sign of forced liquidation cascades, the setup remains BEAR but orderly. No actionable dislocation between derivatives positioning and on-chain fundamentals. Hold positioning; monitor for either renewed downside acceleration or mean-reversion relief.
